name: Ginger Orange Carrots
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 lb Carrots, peeled and cut into diagonal slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Place carrots in a large skillet and cover with water. Bring to a boil.
2. Reduce heat and simmer until crisp-tender, about 3 minutes. Pour off the water, leaving the carrots in the pan.
3. Add orange peel, orange juice, margarine, honey, ginger root, and salt. Stir over medium heat until carrots are glazed, 1 to 2 minutes.
